title: 阪神JFの後に・不屈たる様

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Victory was beyond my grasp... What an utter
disappointment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But this proves the current state of my abilities. I
need to accept the reality before me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how to act even when things go awry is
an important skill in its own right.
choice_data_list: Since people are always watching, right?
Since people are always watching, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Exactly. I will use this loss to propel me forward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So I ask that you don't forget how to conduct
yourself either. You are my trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for the intrusion. I know you must be
tired. But I let my curiosity get the better of me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry you had to see such an awful display. I
should have done better.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize. Your conversation just
now was explanation enough.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The Empress remains undaunted...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: It appears my worries were unfounded.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Such praise is more than I deserve.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Come what may, I will do my utmost to live up to
the faith you have placed in me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I look forward to the rest of your
classic year. Now then, I shall take my leave.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
choice_data_list: Let's head back and review today's race.
Let's head back and review today's race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Agreed.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's no point in wasting time mulling over what
could have been. Let's go—to ensure our next
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the fire in Air Groove's eyes rekindled, I
vow to use what we learned today to win next
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite our loss at the Hanshin J.F., the world at
large continues to watch Air Groove with fervor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The media is awash for days with debate as to
what path she'll take in her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing I should talk to Air Groove, I head to
her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way, I bump into Air Groove at the
academy gates.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, this saves me some time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I was about to contact you. I have something I
wish to discuss.
choice_data_list: Yeah, I wanted to talk to you too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh, very well. Let's move somewhere more
appropriate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Air Groove I want to discuss her upcoming
races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're doing the Tiara tour. I aim to become a
Triple Tiara champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She speaks without a shade of hesitation, her
voice full of determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tiara tour is made up of the Oka Sho, the
Japanese Oaks, and the Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All three are renowned G1 races. A victory in any
one of them is enough to secure fame for years to
come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the title of Triple Tiara champion is a high
honor granted only to those who come out on top
in all three races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume who run in the Tiara tour are more
than just strong—they are also virtuous and
glamorous.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To prove that I belong among their number, I'll
need more than just strength.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to enrapture every pair of eyes in
attendance. I need to be a shining beacon that all
Umamusume aspire toward.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That is my ideal—the essence of what it means to
be Empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As such, attempting the Triple Tiara is a
necessary step toward my end goal.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, the Japanese Oaks is a vital part
of my roots.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of the three races, I absolutely must stand on top at the Japanese Oaks if I wish to even dream of calling myself Empress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's roots... She must be referring to how
her mother shot to fame after winning the
Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
When I announce my intent to pursue the Tiara
tour, my fans will immediately expect me to
follow in my mother's footsteps and conquer the
Japanese Oaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no way of knowing the weight of the
burden she bears. All I can do is provide her with
the best training I can.
